creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
Hello, and thank you for your immediate advice.

Then I did these changes:

Â  Â * Rename patch files so that it is easy for specifying its target.
Â  Â * Change `linguist' to `linguist_build' on Qt components list, because
Â  Â  Â this port depends on it only at the stage of building.
Â  Â * Add `xml' and `qdbus' to Qt components list, that are really
Â  Â  Â necessary libraries.
Â  Â * Run strip command on the pre-install stage.

The portlint checker still warns me that it expects LIB_DEPENDS and
RUN_DEPENDS to appear more earlier, but I don't know how to
correct that. Â No other alert is given.

(2011-02-16)
In addition, pkg-plist is fixed and there is an extra patch appending several
lines on two QMake *.pro files so that certain header files are installed same
as CMake does.
(My bug report about this issue:
http://code.google.com/p/qmmp/issues/detail?id=427 )

-=-=-=-=-=
SimaMoto,RyÅTa <liangtai.s4@gmail.com>
